Class ReportService

java.lang.Object
team44.project22.service.ReportService
@ApplicationScoped public class ReportService extends Object
Service class responsible for generating all management reports: daily sales summaries, product-level sales breakdowns, sales by category, inventory usage, X-report hourly payment summaries, and the end-of-day Z-report with reset logic.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ReportService()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<DailySalesSummary>
    getDailySalesSummary(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Returns a per-day sales summary (total revenue and total quantity) for each date in the given range.
    List<PaymentMethodSummary>
    getHourlyPaymentSummary(int hour)
    Returns the payment-method breakdown for all orders placed during the given hour of today's business date.
    List<InventoryUsageData>
    getInventoryUsage(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Returns inventory usage data (item name and quantity consumed) aggregated by day for the given date range.
    List<ProductSalesData>
    getProductSales(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Returns product-level sales data for each day in the given date range.
    List<ProductSalesData>
    getSalesByCategory(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Returns product-level sales data grouped by category (instead of individual item name) for each day in the given range.

    Checks whether the Z-report has already been generated for today's business date.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReportService

      public ReportService()

  • Method Details

    • hasZRunToday

      public boolean hasZRunToday()
      Checks whether the Z-report has already been generated for today's business date.
      Returns:
      true if a Z-report row exists for today; false otherwise or if a database error occurs.

    • signZReportToday

      public void signZReportToday(int employeeId)
      Records an employee's signature against today's Z-report closeout. Silently ignores duplicate signatures thanks to the ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING clause in the SQL.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - The employee signing the closeout.

    • runZReport

      public ZReportResult runZReport(String generatedBy)
      Generates the end-of-day Z-report for the current business date. This method may only be called once per day; a second call will throw IllegalStateException. It collects the daily payment breakdown, gross sales, tips, and employee signatures, resets the report_totals table, and returns a ZReportResult.
      Parameters:
      generatedBy - A string identifying which employee or process triggered the report (stored for audit purposes).
      Returns:
      A fully-populated ZReportResult.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the Z-report has already been run today.
      RuntimeException - If any other database error occurs.

    • getProductSales

      public List<ProductSalesData> getProductSales(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Returns product-level sales data for each day in the given date range.
      Parameters:
      startDate - The inclusive start date.
      endDate - The inclusive end date.
      Returns:
      A list of ProductSalesData records; empty if no orders exist in the period.

    • getDailySalesSummary

      public List<DailySalesSummary> getDailySalesSummary(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Returns a per-day sales summary (total revenue and total quantity) for each date in the given range.
      Parameters:
      startDate - The inclusive start date.
      endDate - The inclusive end date.
      Returns:
      A list of DailySalesSummary records.

    • getSalesByCategory

      public List<ProductSalesData> getSalesByCategory(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Returns product-level sales data grouped by category (instead of individual item name) for each day in the given range.
      Parameters:
      startDate - The inclusive start date.
      endDate - The inclusive end date.
      Returns:
      A list of ProductSalesData records where the productName field contains the category.

    • getInventoryUsage

      public List<InventoryUsageData> getInventoryUsage(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Returns inventory usage data (item name and quantity consumed) aggregated by day for the given date range.
      Parameters:
      startDate - The inclusive start date.
      endDate - The inclusive end date.
      Returns:
      A list of InventoryUsageData records.

    • getHourlyPaymentSummary

      public List<PaymentMethodSummary> getHourlyPaymentSummary(int hour)
      Returns the payment-method breakdown for all orders placed during the given hour of today's business date. If the Z-report has already been run today, returns zero-value entries for each payment method.
      Parameters:
      hour - The zero-based hour (0–23) to query.
      Returns:
      A list of PaymentMethodSummary records, one per payment method found (or the four default ones if the Z-report has run).
